title: Self-Hosted VPS Deployment (Docker + Nginx)
description: Deploy a Next.js or Node.js app to a VPS (DigitalOcean, AWS EC2, Hetzner) using Docker containers, Nginx as a reverse proxy with SSL, and GitHub Actions for CI/CD.

steps.description: Containerize the app with multi-stage Dockerfile and .dockerignore
Configure Nginx as reverse proxy with SSL/TLS via Certbot, HTTP/2, gzip, security headers
Set up CI/CD to build Docker image, push to registry, and deploy to VPS on every push to main
